basics.name: Salih Abdullah Kilic
basics.label: Data Management Assistant Specialist
basics.summary: Your friendly neighborhood Data Guy! I am a highly motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for data management and analysis. I have background in data management, data analysis, and data visualization. I am a quick learner and a team player who is always eager to learn new things and take on new challenges.

work.name: Sade Software & Consultancy
work.summary: Worked on Data Management, Analysis, and Reporting. Focused on deriving actionable insights to support data-driven decision-making processes. Utilized ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tools for data integration, transformation, and loading into data warehouses, including large-scale migration projects. Ensured data quality and integrity throughout the process. Engaged in data warehousing projects, including designing and optimizing data models for efficient storage and retrieval. Gained hands-on experience with SAS platforms, including SAS Viya, SAS Enterprise Guide (EG), and SAS 9.4.

projects.name: My-Stock-Investment-Advisor-A-Decision-Support-System-for-Investing-in-the-Stock-Market
projects.summary: İzmir Bakırçay University Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences Management Information Systems Department MIS411.7 - Ending Project Fastapi web app developed with tears Python, Javascript, Html and Css , Libraries that used is Yfinance, pandas, BeautifulSoup,
